variant.bug_summary: Free shipping threshold uses > instead of >=.
variant.failing_input_or_sequence: Cart subtotal 10000, region domestic, no coupon.
variant.actual_behavior: Shipping fee is standard domestic fee.

reproduction_input: checkout_quote one physical item at subtotal 10000, domestic address.

observation.summary: inspect_recent_diff read patches/P1B-BUG-001.patch from the Phase C real-diff artifacts; changed files: checkout/shipping.py; changed functions: shipping.free_shipping_eligible. Diff evidence alone is not treated as a reproduced bug.
observation.diff_excerpt:
diff --git a/checkout/shipping.py b/checkout/shipping.py
--- a/checkout/shipping.py
+++ b/checkout/shipping.py
@@ -18,7 +18,7 @@ def free_shipping_eligible(subtotal: int, config: dict[str, Any]) -> bool:
     threshold = config_helpers.get_shipping_threshold(config)
-    return subtotal >= threshold
+    return subtotal > threshold

observation.summary: run_smoke_tests failed 1/4 execution-grounded tests; first failure smoke.checkout_quote_threshold expected {'subtotal': 10000, 'shipping': 0, 'total': 10000} and observed {'subtotal': 10000, 'shipping': 800, 'total': 10800}.
observation.reproduction_input: checkout_quote one physical item at subtotal 10000, domestic address.

test_results.reproduction_input: checkout_quote one physical item at subtotal 10000, domestic address.
calculate_shipping for a digital-only domestic cart.
reserve_stock preorder SKU with zero on-hand stock.

observation.summary: run_boundary_tests failed 1/4 execution-grounded tests; first failure boundary.free_shipping_exact_threshold expected True and observed False.

test_results.reproduction_input: get_tax_rate for JP when tax_rates omits JP.
resolve_region_rate with an address missing region.
calculate_total subtotal=10000, coupon WELCOME500, region JP.
calculate_shipping for a digital-only domestic cart.
reserve_stock preorder SKU with zero on-hand stock.

known_limits: P1b is a small injected-bug benchmark scaffold, not a real-code production debugger.
P1b ranks function-level locations; line spans are explanatory hints only.
P1b predicts fix-intent categories but does not generate patches.
P1b keeps metadata-synth recent-diff evidence synthetic; execution-grounded mode reads Phase C real-diff artifacts.
